headline: Nvidia Is 'Not A Car,' Jensen Huang Says, Defending Its Hard-To-Replace AI Ecosystem
summary: In a podcast posted Wednesday with Dwarkesh Patel, Nvidia Corp CEO Jensen Huang dismissed the idea that AI hardware is becoming a commodity. Huang described Nvidia's core mission as an "incredible journey" of transforming electrons into valuable digital tokens. "The amount of artistry, engineering, science, and invention that goes into making that token valuable… is far from deeply understood," Huang stated. He pushed back against the notion that Nvidia is simply a software company using Taiwan

headline: AI Chips Update - AI Transforms Manufacturing Efficiency Through Strategic Partnerships
summary: At Hannover Messe 2026, Schneider Electric and Microsoft unveiled advancements in AI-powered, open software-defined automation for agentic manufacturing. This collaboration offers a unified approach to enhance manufacturing efficiency and resiliency by integrating EcoStruxure Automation Expert with Microsoft's Azure cloud and AI services. The platform allows manufacturers to standardize processes, simulate and validate automation logic, and expedite production changes, significantly reducing...

headline: Here Are Some of the Top Stocks Since the Market Bottomed in March
summary: The tech-led surge of April has been a windfall for hardware giants, with Intel, Sandisk and Micron Technology standing out. Their shares have surged 66%, 61% and 42%, respectively since March 30, when the S&P 500 closed at its lowest level of the year.
